jsonLd.title: Firstcry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
